sprints.title: harness-build rubric (Phase 2)
sprints.notes: Hard thresholds UNCONDITIONAL per Architect A3. Contract MUST include Should-NOT gates protecting Sprint 6 JIT context annotations and the existing 5-rubric Available Rubrics list in eval-rubric/SKILL.md.

sprints.title: Bootstrap failure catalog from playbook traps (Phase 2)
sprints.notes: Template layout: plugins/trine-eval/skills/bootstrap-failures/templates/by-rubric/harness-build.json (Architect A4). SKILL.md update must specify how kickoff merges per-rubric templates into project failure-catalog.json.

sprints.title: Tasks.json emission: schema port and back-fill (Phase 1.5)
protects_prior: .harness/config.json (existing fields untouched; only taxonomy block added)
sprints.notes: Closes audit-chain gap. Sprints 5-8 ran without tasks.json emission because the schema lived only in cached/published v0.3.3, not in the in-repo source. This sprint ports the schema (adapting grader_type from 2-way to 3-way to match the repo's methodology in commit 408e8a2) and back-fills sprints 7-8. Sprints 1-6 back-fill is explicitly OUT of scope (deferred follow-up). The `bucket` field is omitted from the ported schema pending a separate port of rules/harness-conventions.md. Inserted between Phase 1 and Phase 2 sprints because audit-chain integrity is methodology-foundational.

sprints.title: Planner template for agent-harness builds (Phase 2)
sprints.notes: playbook_stage field on sprints.json entries is SCOPED to harness-build projects only (A6). Contract MUST include backward-compat Should-NOT gate: running Planner without harness-build mode produces identical output to today (S3a). Renumbered from Sprint 9 when Sprint 9 (tasks.json port) was inserted.

sprints.title: End-to-end ephemeral dogfood validation (Phase 2)
sprints.notes: EPHEMERAL: kickoff against a tmp directory, capture output, discard. No examples/ committed. Findings persist as .harness/dogfood-findings.md only. Single round; if PASS, document; if FAIL, document as calibration signal. Should-NOT: no examples/ directory created in this repo. Renumbered from Sprint 10 when Sprint 9 (tasks.json port) was inserted; dependency on prior Planner sprint updated from 9 to 10.

sprints.title: Positioning and rubric decision guidance (Phase 2)
sprints.notes: Adds plugins/trine-eval/skills/eval-rubric/rubrics/README.md with meta-vs-runtime decision guide. eval-harness names the meta layer; harness-build names the runtime layer; the README explains when to pick which. Renumbered from Sprint 11 when Sprint 9 (tasks.json port) was inserted; Planner dependency 9→10, dogfood dependency 10→11.

sprints.title: Workflow-step port and governance hardening (Phase 1.6)
protects_prior: .harness/contracts/sprint-0[1-8].md (only renumbering-only edits permitted under new SN2 carve-out)
sprints.notes: Phase 1.6 audit-chain repair + governance hardening sprint. Closes HK-0003 (Sprints 7-9 council bypass) and HK-0004 (in-repo workflow-step gap). Three deliverables: (a) Port Steps 0.5/1d/3d/3a-3e and Operational Notes from cached v0.3.3 harness-sprint/SKILL.md into in-repo sprint-workflow/SKILL.md (closes HK-0004 dangling references at sprint-contract/SKILL.md:74,140,142). (b) Add bidirectional council-check gates to the workflow when config.governance.enabled is true (Architect P-05, extended post-Sprint-10 per user authorization 2026-06-01): (b1) Pre-sprint gate at Step 0 — if config.governance.review_frequency is set, check for .council/sprint-prebrief/sprint-NN.json and warn if missing. (b2) Post-sprint auto-trigger at Step 5 completion — if config.governance.review_frequency is "every-sprint", the workflow's final action is to invoke /henkaten-council:council-autorun for the sprint just completed before returning to the user, closing the HK-0003 manual-invocation gap by construction. The auto-trigger respects the existing council-autorun andon-stop protocol; an andon halt or autonomy-floor breach surfaces to the user before further sprints are offered. (c) Formal SN2 carve-out: amend sprint-contract methodology to permit renumbering-only edits to approved markdown contracts, with mandatory Revision History block citing the plan-amendment commit. Apply the carve-out by fixing stale Sprint 9/10/11 references in sprint-07.md and sprint-08.md per Scope Guardian #5a. Authorized by user ratification of post-Sprint-9 council fan-out (DEC-0010, DEC-0011, DEC-0012) and post-Sprint-10 user request to make the per-sprint cadence automatic (this commit). Inserted at end (Sprint 13) so Phase 2 (Sprints 10-12) completes without further plan perturbation.
